title: D&D Ranger Beast Master rework
description: A homebrew redesign of the Dungeons & Dragons 5e Ranger class, focused on reworking the Beast Master archetype into a more cohesive and synergistic gameplay system.

The redesign addresses core issues in the original subclass, particularly the weak integration between the ranger and their animal companion, as well as the companion’s limited impact in combat scenarios.

The rework expands beyond a single subclass, aiming to improve the overall flexibility and situational performance of the Ranger class through improved synergy, clearer role definition, and more consistent mechanical identity.
